description.en: List individual error occurrences (events) for a specific Sentry issue.
description.de: Einzelne Fehlervorkommen (Events) fur ein bestimmtes Sentry-Issue auflisten.

vars.AUTH_TOKEN: env:SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN|Get your auth token from https://sentry.io/settings/auth-tokens/

inputs.name: Issue ID

description.en: The ID of the Sentry issue to list events for.

inputs.bot: The Sentry issue ID. Use 'List Issues' to find issue IDs.
